user.title: TMDB API Key
user.description:
Enter your free TMDB API key to enable streaming and cinema features. Leave empty to use TVmaze only (no key needed).

Get a free key at [themoviedb.org/settings/api](https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api) → Developer → Personal use.

country.title: Country & Language
country.description: Select your country from the list of countries supported by TMDB. The language for titles and descriptions is auto-detected — override only if needed.

platforms.title: Streaming Platforms
platforms.description: These are the platforms available in your country according to TMDB. Select the ones you subscribe to.

tvmaze.title: Track a Series or Doc
tvmaze.description: Type a name to search TVmaze. Leave empty to finish without adding any series.

tvmaze_pick.title: Select Series / Doc
tvmaze_pick.description: Choose the correct result from the list.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure What's On Series & Films
reconfigure.description: Update your TMDB API key. The country and platform selection will follow on the next screens.

error.invalid_tmdb_key: Invalid TMDB API key or service unreachable.
error.no_results: No results found. Try a different spelling.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This country is already configured. Use options (⚙) to manage it, or add a new entry for a different country.

menu.title: What’s On Series & Films — Options
menu.description: What would you like to do?

tvmaze.title: Add a Series or Doc
tvmaze.description: Search TVmaze for the series or documentary you want to track.

remove_show.title: Remove a Series or Doc
remove_show.description: Select the one to stop tracking.

update_platforms.title: Change Streaming Platforms
update_platforms.description: The list is fetched live from TMDB for your country.

update_tmdb.title: Update TMDB Key / Country / Language
update_tmdb.description: The country list is fetched live from TMDB.

error.invalid_tmdb_key: Invalid TMDB API key or service unreachable.
